Life of Pi (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $124,987,022Details
International Box Office $494,323,346
Worldwide Box Office $619,310,368
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $23,846,882
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $29,342,903
Total $53,189,785
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A young man survives a disaster at sea and is hurtled into a journey of adventure and discovery. While cast away, he forms an amazing and unexpected connection with another survivor... a fearsome Bengal tiger.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$22,451,514 (18.0% of total gross)
Legs:5.57 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:20.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$120,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,927 opening theaters/2,946 max. theaters, 8.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $186,558,371

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 21st, 2012 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: November 21st, 2012 (Wide) (Taiwan)
November 22nd, 2012 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
November 23rd, 2012 (Wide) (India)
November 29th, 2012 (Wide) (Malaysia)
November 29th, 2012 (Wide) (Singapore)
Video Release: March 12th, 2013 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for emotional thematic content throughout, and some scary action sequences and peril.
(Rating bulletin 2244, 10/10/2012)
Running Time: 125 minutes
Award nomination: 2013 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead, Development Hell, Same Role, Multiple Actors, Unnamed Character, Visual Effects, Voiceover/Narration
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Atheism, Disaster, Marooned, Non-Chronological, On a Boat, Religious, Surprise Twist
Subgenre: Survival Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Fox 2000 Pictures, Dune Entertainment, Ingenious Media, Haishang Films, Gil Netter Productions, Big Screen Prods, Ingenious Film Partners
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.


  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

A young man survives a disaster at sea and is hurtled into a journey of adventure and discovery. While cast away, he forms an amazing and unexpected connection with another survivor... a fearsome Bengal tiger.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$22,451,514 (18.0% of total gross)
Legs:5.57 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:20.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$120,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,927 opening theaters/2,946 max. theaters, 8.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $186,558,371

Movie Details

MPA Rating: PG for emotional thematic content throughout, and some scary action sequences and peril.

Award nomination: 2013 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
